# Funded Bounty Proposal

## Bounty Question

## Domain

## Funding

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| Cash Amount | $<!-- minimum $50 --> |
| Additional PoK Bonus | <!-- standard +50 PoK, or specify --> |
| Expiry | <!-- default: 90 days --> |

## Why This Matters

<!-- Explain why this knowledge gap is important -->

## Funder Information

- **GitHub Username**: @
- **Organization** (optional):

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- What would a valid answer look like? -->

1. [ ] Must contradict a commonly held belief
2. [ ] Must have ≥ 3 independent, accessible sources
3. [ ] Must be independently verifiable
4. [ ] Must follow the Knowledge Entry template

## Escrow Acknowledgment

- [ ] I understand funds will be held in Treasury escrow until a valid PR is merged
- [ ] I understand a 5% platform fee applies
- [ ] I understand funds are refunded if the bounty expires unclaimed (90 days)
